title: Senior Marketing Analyst (all genders)
required_skills: Deep understanding of growth and performance marketing (paid channels, CRM, lifecycle marketing)
Web and app marketing tracking (Google Analytics, event tracking, attribution)
Python and/or R for advanced analyses, modeling, or forecasting
bonus_skills: Familiarity with marketing attribution models and practical application
Experience in data-driven scale-up, digital, or tech environment
missing_skills: BI tools: Looker, Tableau, or Power BI
Web/app tracking tools: Google Analytics, event tracking, attribution platforms
core_responsibilities: Analyze marketing and growth initiatives across the entire customer funnel and assess their impact
Develop and own core KPIs, dashboards, and reports for Growth and Marketing teams
Conduct in-depth cohort, funnel, attribution, and ROI analyses
Design and support Geo-tests, A/B tests and experiments and evaluate their impact on growth and efficiency
Work closely with Growth Marketing to analyze campaigns and enable data-driven budget and channel decisions
recommended_emphasis: Highlight campaign performance analytics and funnel analysis experience prominently
Quantify ROI and KPI framework contributions from HSBC and Minth Group roles
Emphasize A/B testing and experiment design experience
Stress cohort analysis and customer segmentation work
Mention any SQL, Python, or BI tool exposure even if limited
Frame tracking and data quality QA work at Hapag-Lloyd as relevant to attribution and tracking foundation
